forgotPassword.title: Reset Password
forgotPassword.description: Enter your email address, and we'll send you a reset link.
forgotPassword.successMessage: Your reset request has been received.
forgotPassword.errorMessage: Process failed. Please enter a valid email.

2fa.title: Two-Factor Authentication
2fa.subtitle: Enter the 6-digit code from your authenticator app

passkey.notSupported: Passkeys are not supported on this device

register.title: Nuxt Auth
register.subtitle: Create a new account
register.acceptTerms: I accept the terms and conditions
register.mustAcceptTerms: You must accept the terms and conditions.
register.passwordTooWeak: Your password is too weak. Please choose a stronger password.
register.successMessage: Registration successful! You can log in after verifying your account.

resetPassword.title: Set New Password
resetPassword.subtitle: Please enter a new password for your account.
resetPassword.invalidTokenError: Invalid or missing token. Please check your link.
resetPassword.passwordTooWeak: Your password is too weak. Please choose a stronger password.
resetPassword.successMessage: Your password has been successfully reset!
resetPassword.errorMessage: Process failed. The link might have expired.

profile.description: You can view your profile information below.

security.title: Security Settings
security.description: Manage your Two-Factor Authentication and Passkeys for enhanced security.

2fa.title: Two-Factor Authentication
2fa.scanQr: Scan this QR code with your authenticator app
2fa.enterCode: Enter the 6-digit code from the app to confirm

passkey.title: Passkeys
passkey.description: Sign in securely with your fingerprint, face, or screen lock.
passkey.noPasskeys: You don't have any passkeys registered yet.

settings.title: Account Settings
settings.description: You can securely update your password or registered email address here.
settings.passwordVerification: A 6-digit code has been sent to your current email address. Please enter the code to confirm the process.
settings.emailVerification: For your security, enter the codes sent to both your current and new email addresses.

messages.sessionExpired: Your session might have expired, please log in again.
messages.enterNewEmail: You didn't enter your new email address.
messages.passwordLength: New password must be at least 6 characters.
messages.processFailed: Process could not be started. Check your password.
